title: Generate a Service API for Data Processing
scenario: Design a service API for processing large datasets, including endpoints for data ingestion, filtering, and aggregation. The API should also include a feature to retrieve the processed data in a specific format. The output should be a well-structured code snippet with clear comments and documentation.
constraints: Must use a popular programming language (e.g. Python, Java, JavaScript)
Must use a streaming framework (e.g. Apache Kafka, Apache Flink)
Must include at least 3 API endpoints for data processing

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the code snippet adhere to the given constraints?
Is the streaming framework correctly integrated and configured?
Is the code snippet well-structured and documented?
